resolution: Confirmed: Hold reset button for 10 seconds. Reboot takes 10 minutes. Matches manual v3.0.
Firmware update takes 15 minutes. Do not power off. Use version 4.3 only from support.networkpro.com.
Maximum supported devices is 50. Hardware limitation confirmed by engineering team.
3 red blinks means hard reset required. Follow Section 1 of manual v3.0.

issue: Customer asked about warranty claim after 2 years
resolution: Warranty is 3 years as per manual v3.0. Customer is still within warranty period.
System locks after 5 failed login attempts. Admin password default is Admin@2024.
Maximum throughput is 1200 Mbps on 5GHz. Check interference and distance from router.
